name: newForm
description: Page generated with Bonita UI designer

value: function ($data) {   switch ($data.mission.statut) {     case -2:       return "Suspendue";     case -1:       return "Refusée";     case 0:       return "En attente de validation";     case 1:       return "Validée";     default:       return "Statut inconnu";   } }
